raw_consumer_statement:
Hello, Back in XX/XX/year> I engaged with a contractor to provide us some services. I had asked to use my Citi credit card as I wanted the points. The contactor tried to open an account with XXXX  ( 3rd party that allows contractors etc. to accept credit card payments ). 

We paid {$5300.00} XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX  on our Citi card to XXXX. a Month went by and our contractor still did not get the money from XXXX into his bank account. We paid him with a check and went back to Citi to get a refund. They gave us a temporary refund. the refund was subsequently rescinded, and they requested a lot more information that I provided to them numerous times now. This has been ongoing for two months and we want our money back. 

This is taking far too long. The guilty party is XXXX as I believe they still have the original payment.
